Cabrini (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,512,135Details
International Box Office $1,079,465
Worldwide Box Office $20,591,600
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Eventually becoming the first American saint of the Catholic Church and one of the most inspiring entrepreneurs in American history, Francesca Cabrini devoted her life to fighting for the happiness and health of individuals in the margins of her society. Her determination to serve those in need—and fight the obstacles and bigotry that stood in her way—inspire people to fight harder and love better.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,168,520 (36.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.72 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:94.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,840 opening theaters/2,850 max. theaters, 3.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $20,633,524

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 8th, 2024 (Wide) by Angel Studios
International Releases: March 7th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
March 7th, 2024 (Wide) (New Zealand)
March 8th, 2024 (Wide) (South Africa)
March 8th, 2024 (Wide) (Ecuador)
March 8th, 2024 (Wide) (Serbia and Montenegro)
Video Release: June 25th, 2024 by Angel Studios
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic material, some violence, language and smoking.
(Rating bulletin 2813 (cert #54773), 12/13/2023)
Running Time: 142 minutes
Geographical setting: New York, New York City
Plot point: Biography, Christians, Monks and Nuns, Religious
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Time period setting: 1880s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Angel Studios, Lodigiano Film Development
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Summary
  • Box Office

Synopsis

Eventually becoming the first American saint of the Catholic Church and one of the most inspiring entrepreneurs in American history, Francesca Cabrini devoted her life to fighting for the happiness and health of individuals in the margins of her society. Her determination to serve those in need—and fight the obstacles and bigotry that stood in her way—inspire people to fight harder and love better.
